metadata.description: Opt-in commit-boundary enforcement of the Living Docs mechanical invariants.

plugins.name: living-docs-enforcer
plugins.description: OPT-IN enforcement of the Living Docs mechanical invariants at the git-commit boundary. Recommended for teams that want the docs floor enforced, not just advised. Bundles the living-docs skill and a PreToolUse hook that runs lint-docs.sh on git commit; enforcement is configurable via LIVING_DOCS_ENFORCE (block|warn).
